title: pharus angustifolius
intro: Pharus angustifolius, also known as Pharus grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Pharus angustifolius include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pharus angustifolius can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
